problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Combining Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
